class.name: GaussianSplatNode3D
class.brief_description: 3D scene node for displaying Gaussian splat content in a Godot scene.
class.description: GaussianSplatNode3D is the primary scene node for integrating Gaussian Splatting into Godot projects. It handles asset loading from PLY and SPZ files, quality preset management, level-of-detail control, painterly brush-stroke effects, wind simulation, color grading, and debug visualization. The node participates in the shared scene renderer registry and supports both editor preview and runtime rendering.

method.name: set_ply_file_path
method.description: Sets the file path for loading Gaussian splat data. Accepts both [code].ply[/code] and [code].spz[/code] formats. Triggers an asset reload if [member auto_load] is enabled.

method.name: get_ply_file_path
method.description: Returns the currently configured splat file path.

method.name: set_splat_asset
method.description: Assigns a GaussianSplatAsset resource as the data source. When set, this takes precedence over [member ply_file_path].

method.name: get_splat_asset
method.description: Returns the currently assigned GaussianSplatAsset resource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: set_auto_load
method.description: Enables or disables automatic loading of the splat asset when the node enters the scene tree or when the file path changes.

method.name: is_auto_load_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if automatic asset loading is enabled.

method.name: reload_asset
method.description: Forces a reload of the splat asset from disk. Useful after external modifications to the source file.

method.name: is_asset_loading
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if an asset load operation is currently in progress.

method.name: set_splat_data
method.description: Creates a Gaussian splat dataset from raw arrays and assigns it to this node. Only [param positions] is required; all other arrays default to empty or sensible values. This is the programmatic alternative to loading a PLY file.

method.name: set_quality_preset
method.description: Applies a quality preset that configures LOD bias, max render distance, and splat count limits in one operation.

method.name: get_quality_preset
method.description: Returns the current quality preset.

method.name: set_lod_bias
method.description: Sets the LOD bias multiplier (0.1 to 4.0). Higher values keep more splats visible at greater distances.

method.name: get_lod_bias
method.description: Returns the current LOD bias multiplier.

method.name: set_max_render_distance
method.description: Sets the maximum distance in meters at which splats are rendered. Splats beyond this distance are culled.

method.name: get_max_render_distance
method.description: Returns the current maximum render distance in meters.

method.name: set_max_splat_count
method.description: Sets the maximum number of splats to render per frame. Excess splats are culled by importance.

method.name: get_max_splat_count
method.description: Returns the current maximum splat count.

method.name: set_enable_painterly
method.description: Enables or disables painterly post-processing effects for this node.

method.name: is_painterly_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if painterly effects are enabled.

method.name: set_edge_threshold
method.description: Sets the edge detection sensitivity for painterly stroke placement. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_edge_threshold
method.description: Returns the current painterly edge threshold.

method.name: set_stroke_opacity
method.description: Sets the opacity of painterly brush strokes. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_stroke_opacity
method.description: Returns the current painterly stroke opacity.

method.name: set_stroke_width
method.description: Sets the width of painterly brush strokes. Range is 0.1 to 5.0.

method.name: get_stroke_width
method.description: Returns the current painterly stroke width.

method.name: set_color_variation
method.description: Sets the color variation amount for painterly effects. Legacy method retained for compatibility with existing scenes and scripts.

method.name: get_color_variation
method.description: Returns the current color variation amount.

method.name: set_temporal_blend
method.description: Sets the temporal blending factor for painterly effects. Controls smoothness of frame-to-frame transitions. Range is 0.01 to 1.0.

method.name: get_temporal_blend
method.description: Returns the current temporal blend factor.

method.name: set_painterly_seed
method.description: Sets the random seed for painterly noise generation. Range is 0 to 65535.

method.name: get_painterly_seed
method.description: Returns the current painterly seed.

method.name: set_update_mode
method.description: Sets when the node's splat rendering is updated. See [enum ViewportUpdateMode] for available options.

method.name: get_update_mode
method.description: Returns the current update mode.

method.name: set_cast_shadow
method.description: Enables or disables shadow casting from this splat node.

method.name: get_cast_shadow
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if shadow casting is enabled.

method.name: set_use_frustum_culling
method.description: Enables or disables frustum culling for this node's splats.

method.name: is_frustum_culling_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if frustum culling is enabled.

method.name: set_use_occlusion_culling
method.description: Enables or disables occlusion culling. Legacy method retained for compatibility with existing scenes and scripts.

method.name: is_occlusion_culling_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if occlusion culling is enabled.

method.name: set_opacity
method.description: Sets the overall opacity for this node's splats. Range is 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0 (fully opaque).

method.name: get_opacity
method.description: Returns the current opacity value.

method.name: set_wind_override_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables per-node wind parameter overrides. When enabled, this node uses its own wind settings instead of the global defaults.

method.name: is_wind_override_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if per-node wind overrides are enabled.

method.name: set_wind_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables wind simulation for this node's splats.

method.name: is_wind_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if wind simulation is enabled.

method.name: set_wind_strength
method.description: Sets the wind strength multiplier for splat displacement.

method.name: get_wind_strength
method.description: Returns the current wind strength.

method.name: set_wind_direction
method.description: Sets the wind direction vector. Does not need to be normalized; the magnitude affects displacement amplitude.

method.name: get_wind_direction
method.description: Returns the current wind direction vector.

method.name: set_wind_frequency
method.description: Sets the wind oscillation frequency. Higher values produce faster wind gusts.

method.name: get_wind_frequency
method.description: Returns the current wind frequency.

method.name: set_color_grading
method.description: Assigns a ColorGradingResource that applies color correction transforms to splat colors.

method.name: get_color_grading
method.description: Returns the assigned ColorGradingResource, or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: bake_color_grading
method.description: Permanently applies the current color grading transform to all splat colors. The original colors are backed up and can be restored via [method restore_color_grading]. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: bake_color_grading_snapshot
method.description: Permanently applies the given [param grading_snapshot] color grading transform to all splat colors. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: restore_color_grading
method.description: Reverts all splat colors to their state before the first [method bake_color_grading] call, restoring the original unbaked colors.

method.name: is_color_grading_baked
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if color grading has been baked into the splat colors and can be restored.

method.name: get_visible_splat_count
method.description: Returns the number of splats that were visible and rendered in the most recent frame.

method.name: get_total_splat_count
method.description: Returns the total number of splats in the loaded dataset.

method.name: get_last_update_time_ms
method.description: Returns the time spent on the most recent rendering update in milliseconds.

method.name: get_gpu_memory_mb
method.description: Returns the GPU memory used by this node's splat data in megabytes.

method.name: get_statistics
method.description: Returns a dictionary of detailed rendering statistics for this node, including splat counts, timing, memory usage, and quality settings.

method.name: get_configuration_warnings
method.description: Returns an array of configuration warning messages for the editor. Warns about missing data, unsupported configurations, or performance concerns.

method.name: set_preview_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables editor preview rendering for this node.

method.name: is_preview_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if editor preview is enabled.

method.name: set_show_bounds
method.description: Enables or disables the axis-aligned bounding box wireframe overlay.

method.name: is_showing_bounds
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the bounds overlay is visible.

method.name: set_show_statistics
method.description: Enables or disables the statistics overlay in the viewport.

method.name: is_showing_statistics
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the statistics overlay is visible.

method.name: set_show_tile_grid
method.description: Enables or disables the tile grid debug overlay.

method.name: is_showing_tile_grid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tile grid overlay is visible.

method.name: set_show_density_heatmap
method.description: Enables or disables the per-tile density heatmap overlay.

method.name: is_showing_density_heatmap
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the density heatmap is visible.

method.name: set_show_performance_hud
method.description: Enables or disables the performance HUD overlay.

method.name: is_showing_performance_hud
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the performance HUD is visible.

method.name: set_show_lod_spheres
method.description: Enables or disables visualization of LOD transition spheres in the viewport.

method.name: is_showing_lod_spheres
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if LOD sphere visualization is active.

method.name: set_show_performance_overlay
method.description: Enables or disables the runtime performance overlay.

method.name: is_showing_performance_overlay
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the performance overlay is visible.

method.name: set_debug_overlay_opacity
method.description: Sets the opacity of debug overlays. Range is 0.0 to 1.0.

method.name: get_debug_overlay_opacity
method.description: Returns the current debug overlay opacity.

method.name: set_debug_draw_mode
method.description: Sets the debug visualization mode for this node.

method.name: get_debug_draw_mode
method.description: Returns the current debug draw mode.

method.name: set_runtime_preview_enabled
method.description: Enables or disables runtime preview rendering. When enabled, the splat output is rendered in a play-mode viewport overlay.

method.name: is_runtime_preview_enabled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if runtime preview rendering is enabled.

method.name: set_show_residency_hud
method.description: Enables or disables the GPU residency HUD overlay.

method.name: is_showing_residency_hud
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the residency HUD is visible.

method.name: get_renderer
method.description: Returns the internal GaussianSplatRenderer instance used by this node. May be shared with other nodes in the scene registry.

method.name: update_splats
method.description: Manually triggers a splat rendering update. Required when [member rendering/update_mode] is set to [constant UPDATE_MODE_MANUAL].

method.name: force_update
method.description: Forces an immediate full rendering update, bypassing visibility and caching checks.

members.member: Path to a PLY or SPZ file to load. Accepts [code]*.ply[/code] and [code]*.spz[/code] file formats.
The GaussianSplatAsset resource providing splat data. Takes precedence over [member ply_file_path] when set.
When enabled, the asset is loaded automatically when the node enters the scene tree.
The quality preset controlling LOD, distance, and splat count tradeoffs.
LOD bias multiplier (0.1 to 4.0). Higher values keep more splats visible at distance.
Maximum number of splats to render per frame.
Edge detection sensitivity for painterly stroke placement.
Temporal blending factor for frame-to-frame smoothness of painterly effects.
Random seed for painterly noise generation.
Enables shadow casting from this splat node.
Enables frustum culling of offscreen splats.
Global opacity for all splats in this node.
Enables wind simulation for this node's splats.
Color grading transform applied to splat colors.
Shows the tile grid debug overlay.
Shows the GPU residency HUD overlay.

signal.name: asset_loaded
signal.description: Emitted when the splat asset has been successfully loaded and the node is ready to render.

signal.name: asset_loading_failed
signal.description: Emitted when the splat asset fails to load. [param error] contains a description of what went wrong.

signal.name: viewport_visibility_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the node's visibility within its viewport changes. [param visible] is [code]true[/code] when the node becomes visible.

constants.constant: Prioritizes rendering speed with aggressive LOD culling and lower splat limits.
Balanced tradeoff between visual quality and rendering performance.
Prioritizes visual fidelity with higher splat limits and less aggressive culling.
Manual configuration of all quality parameters.
Updates rendering every frame regardless of visibility.
Updates rendering only when the node is visible in a viewport.
Updates rendering only when the node's parent is visible.
Rendering is only updated when [method update_splats] is called explicitly.
Normal rendering with no debug visualization.
Point cloud visualization showing splat centers.
Heatmap visualization of per-pixel splat density.
